recalls.Description: Primark has announced a recall for the DTR Plush Bag Stitch and DTR Plush Bag Angel due to potential choking hazards. The Stitch bags are available in blue, while the Angel bags come in purple. Each bag measures approximately 10 inches in length and 8 inches in width, featuring a swing tag care label attached to the side.
recalls.Title: Primark Issues Recall for DTR Plush Bag Stitch and DTR Plush Bag Angel Due to Choking Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, consumers can contact Primark at 617-946-3236 from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or visit www.primark.com/recall. Alternatively, consumers can go to www.primark.com and click on 'Recall' at the bottom of the page.

Images.Caption: Recalled Primark DTR Plush Bag - Stitch
Recalled Primark DTR Plush Bag - Angel

Retailers.Name: Primark stores located in the northeast and in Florida, Maryland and Illinois from March 2024 through October 2024 for about $6.

Importers.Name: Primark US Corp., of Boston, Massachusetts

Hazards.Name: Detachable zipper pull poses choking and ingestion risks

Remedies.Name: Return to Primark for a full refund

seo.metaDescription: Primark recalls DTR Plush Bag Stitch and Angel due to choking hazards. Return for a full refund.
seo.ogTitle: Primark Issues Recall for DTR Plush Bag Stitch and DTR Plush Bag Angel Due to Choking Risks
seo.ogDescription: Primark recalls DTR Plush Bag Stitch and Angel due to choking hazards. Return for a full refund.
seo.twitterTitle: Primark Issues Recall for DTR Plush Bag Stitch and DTR Plush Bag Angel Due to Choking Risks
seo.twitterDescription: Primark recalls DTR Plush Bag Stitch and Angel due to choking hazards. Return for a full refund.

recalls.Description: Dlesot Snap Hair Clips, sold in a multipack of 120, are being recalled due to a significant lead poisoning hazard. These metal clips, measuring approximately 1.2 inches, come in various colors and patterns. A white label on the plastic container box indicates the FNSKU number "X00RCTBRH" and states they are "Made in China."
recalls.Title: Dlesot Snap Children's Hair Clips Recalled for Lead Poisoning Risk; Sold by YFLGOTOO on Amazon
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further information, contact YFLGOTOO via email at YGLGOTOOrecall@yeah.net.

Images.Caption: Recalled Dlesot Snap Hair Clips in plastic container with label

Retailers.Name: Online at www.amazon.com from April 2024 through September 2024 for about $10.

Hazards.Name: Lead poisoning risk due to excessive lead levels in paint on the clips, which can be harmful if ingested by children.

Remedies.Name: Consumers are advised to immediately remove the recalled clips from children, cease usage, and reach out to YFLGOTOO. A photo of the disposal will be required to obtain the remedy. Amazon will notify all known buyers directly.

seo.metaDescription: Dlesot Snap Hair Clips recalled due to lead poisoning risk. Immediate action required for consumer safety.
seo.ogTitle: Dlesot Snap Children's Hair Clips Recalled for Lead Poisoning Risk; Sold by YFLGOTOO on Amazon
seo.ogDescription: Dlesot Snap Hair Clips recalled due to lead poisoning risk. Immediate action required for consumer safety.
seo.twitterTitle: Dlesot Snap Children's Hair Clips Recalled for Lead Poisoning Risk; Sold by YFLGOTOO on Amazon
seo.twitterDescription: Dlesot Snap Hair Clips recalled due to lead poisoning risk. Immediate action required for consumer safety.

recalls.Description: Claire's and Icing have issued a recall for their Halloween witch hats made entirely from polyester. These black hats feature a blue mesh scarf adorned with sparkling stars above the brim. The sewn-in tag inside the hat displays the name 'CBI Distributing Corporation.' This recall is due to the hats failing to meet federal flammability standards, which poses a burn risk to consumers.
recalls.Title: Recall of Claire's Halloween Witch Hats Due to Burn Hazard and Flammability Violation
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further information, consumers can reach Claire's toll-free at 888-252-4737 from 8:30 a.m. to 6 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, email NAProductRecall@claires.com, or visit www.claires.com/us/recall-notices/ or www.claires.com and navigate to 'Product Recalls' in the Help section.

Products.Name: Halloween Witch Hats
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 5,700 (In addition, about 450 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: "CBI Distributing Corporation" is printed on the sewn-in tag inside the hat

Retailers.Name: Claire's and Icing stores nationwide from July 2023 through December 2023 for about $15.

Distributors.Name: Claire's and Icing Stores, of Hoffman Estates, Illinois

Hazards.Name: Risk of burn injuries due to violation of federal flammability requirements

Remedies.Name: Return the hats to any Claire's or Icing store for a full refund

seo.metaDescription: Claire's recalls Halloween witch hats due to burn hazards and flammability violations. Stop using them and return for a refund.
seo.ogTitle: Recall of Claire's Halloween Witch Hats Due to Burn Hazard and Flammability Violation
seo.ogDescription: Claire's recalls Halloween witch hats due to burn hazards and flammability violations. Stop using them and return for a refund.
